reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: This patch series addresses a bug in __access_remote_vm() where the wrong mask is used for pointer masking due to reading current->mm instead of the target mm. The new function, untagged_addr_remote_unlocked(), correctly handles this and annotates accesses to context.pmlen with READ_ONCE() and WRITE_ONCE().

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for untagged addresses in the RISC-V architecture, specifically addressing a bug where __access_remote_vm() would untag the remote address using the wrong mask due to reading current->mm instead of the target mm. The patch introduces a new function, untagged_addr_remote_unlocked(), which correctly handles pointer masking and annotates accesses to context.pmlen with READ_ONCE() and WRITE_ONCE() for KCSAN cleanliness.
